name: Cheesecake- Mine
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs in a large bowl.
2. Blend in sugar, flour, and cornstarch until well combined.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients, blending well after each addition.
4. Mix until the batter is smooth.
5. Pour the batter into a 9-inch springform pan. The pan will be very full.
6. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour.
7. Turn off the oven and leave it on with the door open for another hour to cool down gradually.
8. Remove from the oven and refrigerate.
Note: This recipe does not require a crust. A basic graham cracker or chocolate cookie crust with butter can be used. A 10-inch pan can also be used for this tall cake. Adjust the amount of sugar to your taste. Decorate with fruit, chocolate, or any other desired toppings before serving.
